title: Introduction To Internet Of Things - Week 1
subject: Introduction To Internet Of Things

questions.question: What is the full form of IoT?
The "Source Address" field in the IPv6 header is of _______ bits in length.
Which of the following is/are not an enabler of IoT?
The gateway is tasked with assigning a unique address to each of the field devices or sensors within its jurisdiction.
State whether the following statement is True or False. Statement: The Increasing number of devices in IoT is expected to result in an address crunch.
In ___________ a node/network is connected to multiple networks for improved reliability.
Which of the following is NOT a function of an IoT Gateway?
options: Connects the IoT LAN to a WAN
Can implement several LAN and WAN

questions.question: Which of the following statements is/are incorrect? Statement I: An actuator is a component of a machine or system that moves or controls the mechanism or the system. Statement II: An actuator requires a control signal and a source of energy.
Which of the following is NOT a function of an IoT LAN?
State whether the following statement is True or False. Statement: The word "Transducer" is a collective term used for both Sensors and Actuators.
Analog Sensors produce a discontinuous output signal or voltage, which is generally proportional to the quantity being measured.
If the output signal differs from the correct value by a constant, the sensor has an ___________.
State True or False: Pneumatic actuators enable the production of large forces from a relatively larger pressure changes.
A sensor node is made up of which of the following?
What is the full form of SMP in the context of IoT actuators?
